name: agent-dev
description: Cross-platform agent skills for AI-powered CLI tools

metadata.description: Curated plugins for structured agent workflows

plugins.name: deliver
plugins.description: Generic issue-resolution loop. Orchestrates concise plan -> work -> review convergence with specialist agents, evidence gates, and escalation paths.

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: Transforms vague ideas into complete feature designs through structured clarification. The plan skill coordinates repository and external research, ambiguity detection, and iterative user clarification to produce fully resolved specifications with no open questions.

plugins.name: chats
plugins.description: Chat platform integrations. Skills for interacting with messaging platforms like WhatsApp — search conversations, send messages, manage contacts and groups, all from the CLI.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development skills — core engineering principles for AI-maintained codebases, production-grade frontend interfaces, CodePen integration, dev server log reading, and browser console log capture.

plugins.name: documents
plugins.description: Document processing skills for creating, editing, and manipulating various document formats including Word (.docx), PDF, PowerPoint (.pptx), Excel (.xlsx), and collaborative document co-authoring workflows.
